title: Debug assertion sqlite3MemCompare: Assertion `pMem1->enc==pMem2->enc || pMem1->db->mallocFailed' failed
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t0 USING fts5(c0);
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE CAST(SUBSTR(c0, 0) AS TEXT) > 0;
key_bug_features: SELECT with UTF16 encoding triggers assertion error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, c1 TEXT NOT NULL, c2 BLOB);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2) VALUES (x'00', x'01');
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t2 USING fts5(c3);
INSERT INTO t2(c3) VALUES (CAST((SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE id = 1) AS TEXT));
